note: Each prompt = brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt. Engine: fal.ai (FLUX1.1 pro ultra for stills/icons, Ideogram v3 for the button). Transparency via `fal.py bg` (BiRefNet) then `imgkit alpha`; scenes/portraits via `imgkit webp`. The book cover and Hill portrait are the user-supplied real source assets (not generated) — only matted/treated. seed 19370 across the set.

assets.subjectPrompt: An ornate symmetrical art-deco golden SUNBURST radiating from center, concentric stepped arcs and fine rays, fan/chevron deco border, deep emerald-black, large empty center for the book.

assets.engine: source (user-supplied cover) -> fal.py bg -> imgkit alpha
assets.subjectPrompt: Real 'Think and Grow Rich' paperback cover, background removed.
Vintage black-and-white portrait of Napoleon Hill holding the book; tinted to sepia/gold duotone in CSS.
Art-deco circular medallion emblem: concentric stepped gold rings, radiating sunburst, central monogram + upward arrow.
assets.post: fal.py bg ; imgkit alpha --size 512 ; imgkit favicon --size 256

assets.subjectPrompt: Six matching art-deco gold medallion icons (Desire=flame, Faith=sunrise, Auto-Suggestion=mind, Specialized Knowledge=book+key, Persistence=mountain, Mastermind=knot) — one shared deco descriptor.
Art-deco award seal: laurel wreath + crown + ribbon banner, empty gold center for an HTML number overlay.
Single faceted five-point gold art-deco star (rating glyph + divider centerpiece).
Large art-deco gold quotation/flourish ornament for the pull-quote band.
Wide embossed antique-gold art-deco pill, one line of engraved deco capitals reading exactly 'BUY ON AMAZON'. THE one image CTA; reused at hero, offer and final CTA. Every other button is CSS.
Tiny tiled monochrome grain for the page-wide overlay.
